title: Synchronous Harmonics FAIL: falsifier with wrong sync_time and wrong interference label
_primary_source_note: Intentional falsifier for validator testing (not a new claim), same theorems as the PASS fixtures: coprime sync and par interference (Iverson, 1988) Pyth-2 Ch XIII and (Iverson, 1990) QA-2 Ch 6.
_fixture_purpose: Falsifier: sync_pair (3,5) declares sync_time=999 (should be 15, trips SH_SYNC), and par_pair (3,7) declares interference=OPPOSE (should be SUPPORT since both are 3-par, trips SH_PAR).

par_pairs.note: FALSIFIER: both 3-par so interference should be SUPPORT, declared OPPOSE

validation_checks.description: FALSIFIER: par_pair (3,7) declared OPPOSE, computed SUPPORT

fail_ledger: SH_PAR: par_pair[0] (3,7) declared OPPOSE, computed SUPPORT
